headline: A work found the flaw in the instrument it was built from.

beats.heading: An instrument, under conditions.
beats.quote: a caveat stated once here must not go unstated twice downstream
beats.attribution: standing self-binding commitment of the source, session 22

beats.heading: A work takes it on — conditions included.
beats.quote: Live status travels; load-bearing caveats survive re-voicing; corrections flow upstream, never silently sideways
beats.attribution: the work's own admission contract, session 07

beats.heading: The receiver declines the most spectacular case.
beats.quote: A work about machine judgment may not borrow stakes the record does not attribute to the machine
beats.attribution: rationale stated in the work, session 08

beats.heading: The correction flows backwards.
beats.quote: Although the panel did not rely on AI-detection evidence, it credited graders' ability to identify AI-written work, pointed to irrelevant sources that raised concerns about AI use, and cited Yang's lack of citations, repeated excuses, and inconsistent testimony.
beats.attribution: reported by the work into the source archive, delivered by the conductor

beats.heading: The source re-examines itself.
beats.quote: Arrived as the collective's first downstream correction report
beats.attribution: register revised after a renewed verification pass, session 33

divergence.leftQuote: a detector-in-the-accusation observation, not court-attributed detector harm
divergence.rightQuote: the University of Minnesota expulsion case as detector-attributed harm on the work's verdict card
